# Aspire Type System Capabilities
# Generated by: aspire sdk dump --format ci

# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource [ExposeProperties]
Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaUIContainerResource

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/addKafka(name: string, port?: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/withDataBindMount(source: string, isReadOnly?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/withDataVolume(name?: string, isReadOnly?: boolean) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/withHostPort(port: number) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaUIContainerResource
Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/withKafkaUI(configureContainer?: callback, containerName?: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource
Aspire.Hosting/KafkaServerResource.connectionStringExpression(context: Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ReferenceExpression
Aspire.Hosting/KafkaServerResource.host(context: Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.EndpointReferenceExpression
Aspire.Hosting/KafkaServerResource.internalEndpoint(context: Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.EndpointReference
Aspire.Hosting/KafkaServerResource.port(context: Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.EndpointReferenceExpression
Aspire.Hosting/KafkaServerResource.primaryEndpoint(context: Aspire.Hosting.Kafka/Aspire.Hosting.KafkaServerResource) -> Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.EndpointReference
